mcq.question: What is the purpose of decision making statements in C?
Which statement is used to execute code only when a condition is true?
Which statement executes one block if a condition is true and another if it is false?
What is a nested if statement?
Which structure is used to check multiple conditions?
Which statement is commonly used for menu-driven programs?
Which keyword is used to provide a default option in switch?
What is the purpose of the break statement in switch?
What happens if break is omitted in a switch case?
Which statement is best for complex logical conditions?
How many blocks can an if-else statement execute at a time?
Which keyword follows an if block when the condition is false?
Which operator is often used in decision making conditions?
Which value represents true in C?
Which value represents false in C?
Can switch statements work with character constants?
Which statement allows a program to make decisions?
Which keyword begins a switch statement?
What is the final optional block in an else-if ladder?
Decision making statements help control the ________ of a program.

true_false.statement: The if statement executes only when the condition is true.
switch can replace every if-else statement.
A nested if is an if statement inside another if statement.
The default block in switch is optional.
else executes when the if condition is false.
switch can directly evaluate floating-point ranges.
Decision making statements control program execution flow.
An else-if ladder is used for multiple conditions.

fill_blanks.question: The ________ statement executes code when a condition is true.
The ________ statement executes one block for true and another for false.
An if statement inside another if statement is called a ________ if.
The ________ statement is used for multi-way selection.
The ________ keyword provides a default option in a switch statement.
The ________ statement terminates a switch case.
Multiple conditions can be checked using an ________ ladder.
A condition in C evaluates to either true or ________.
Decision making statements control the ________ of execution.
When no case matches in a switch, the ________ block executes.
